rules.rule: A Standard solution must contain: an API project, a Build infrastructure project, a Provision project, an Acceptance test project, and a Build test project.
Projects must be named using the pattern {Product}.{Layer}.
Infrastructure projects must use the suffix .Infrastructure.Build for build and .Infrastructure.Provision for provisioning.
Test projects must use the suffix .Tests.Acceptance for acceptance tests and .Tests.Build for build tests.
Source project folders must be organised by architectural layer: Brokers, Models, Migrations, Services, Controllers.
Models must be organised by domain under Models/Foundations/{Entity}/ with an Exceptions/ subfolder per entity.
Services must be organised by type: Services/Foundations/, Services/Processings/, Services/Orchestrations/.
Brokers must be organised by concern: Brokers/DateTimes/, Brokers/Loggings/, Brokers/Storages/.
Layers must not be mixed in the same folder.
Test projects must mirror the source project folder structure.
Tests must be organised under Services/{ServiceType}/{ServiceName}/ within the test project.
